sqlCommand.descr: update TransX set GL = substring(GL,1,5) + '01' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not GL like '%99998'
insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, Amt1, Flex1) (Select KeyID, GL, round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, 'pass1' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, GL)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, Contract, Amt1) (Select KeyID, substring(GL,1,3) + '0001', ' OR1-T' as Contract, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')
update TransX set TTY = '',ReinName = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Contract = 'OR1', TP = '2002', ReinName = '1000001411' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Contract is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, TP, Contract, ReinName, TTY, Amt1) (Select KeyID,Descr as GL, TP, Contract, ReinName, Field2 as TTY, Amt1 * cast(Field3 as int) as Amt1 from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on GL = ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'ElimGLmap8' )
update TransX set BusCat = '33', PC='2202EU0827',Co='4110',Txt = 'USD true-up' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Amt2 = 0,Flex9 = '',Assgnmt = '',CC = '',ProdCode = '',UWYR = '',AccYr = '',ReinLoc = '',CatCode = '',PTF = '',Broker = '',RiskTerr = '',Stat = '',TransCode = '',RefKey1 = '',RefKey2 = '',RefKey3 = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ReinsType = 0
update TransX set ProdCode = 'UNKNOWN' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Product = 1
update TransX set UWYR = '[year]' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and UWYear = 1
update TransX set AccYr = '[year]' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and AccidentYear = 1
update TransX set ReinLoc = 'USCT' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and InsurerLocation = 1
update TransX set RiskTerr = 'UNKN' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and RiskLocation = 1
update TransX set Broker = 'UNKNOWN' from TransX t inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation v on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and v.Broker = 1
update TransX set ReinName = 'UNKNOWN' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Cedant = 1
update TransX set TransCode = 'T9999' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation v on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and v.TransCode = 1
update TransX set PK = '40' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 > 0
update TransX set PK = '50' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 < 0
update TransX set ReinName = '' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Cedant = 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID,  GL, Amt1) values ('[batchID]',
